hero_title_accent: Alert Routing for Digital Asset Compliance
hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs route wallet and transaction alerts into prioritized queues with clear case linkage to streamline compliance review and maintain audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Alert routing depends on manual handoffs
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays when KYT transaction alerts move through disconnected queues and unclear escalation paths. This fragmentation makes it harder to assign alerts accurately, track case progress, and maintain a consistent audit trail.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects multi-provider wallet risk alerts, compliance queues, reviewer assignments and case escalation paths into a unified workflow that supports accurate routing and preserves audit evidence.
workflow_title: Alerts move into structured review cases
workflow_description: SFTY routes wallet risk alerts through configurable rules to open cases, assign reviewers, record decisions and preserve evidence for compliance actions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond alert overload. One review layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYT alert outputs into structured routing, case management, decision logs and audit-ready evidence to streamline transaction monitoring workflows for compliance teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled alert routing, evidence preservation and governance designed for audit-ready workflows, bank due diligence and scalable compliance operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support alert routing and triage workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how alerts are routed to compliance review queues
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports alert decision processes
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain provider orchestration for managing multi-source alert inputs
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet risk, transaction alerts, provider outputs and regulatory rules into one compliance workflow for VASPs, improving alert triage, case management and audit readiness.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY route KYT alerts effectively?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies configurable rules to route alerts to appropriate reviewers, queues or escalation paths, supporting efficient prioritization and handling within the compliance team.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve transaction alert evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence-grade transaction and wallet alert data, decision logs and case records to support audit trails and regulatory review readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without requiring replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace individual KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates as a compliance control layer above providers, structuring their outputs into cases, workflows and evidence but does not replace any underlying service.
final_title: Connect KYT alerts to structured review workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY routes wallet and transaction alerts into prioritized cases with clear evidence and audit-ready decision records.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
